rationale: The two papers are closely aligned in domain and method: both use randomized field experiments with salespeople in Indian settings to estimate causal effects of compensation/incentive designs and mechanisms. The citing paper’s stated gap (causal evidence on contest effectiveness and mechanisms) plausibly builds on the cited paper’s causal evidence on incentive compensation and heterogeneity, so this is not safely an incidental mention from the available metadata (even though only a DOI match is provided).
